title: ANZIIF to hold Rendezvous in October
full_text:
ANZIIF to hold Rendezvous in October
The Australian and New Zealand Institute of Insurance and Finance will hold its biennial Reinsurance Rendezvous conference from October 13-14.
ANZIIF says the forum brings together insurers, reinsurers, brokers and risk professionals from across the Asia-Pacific region to explore developments shaping the industry and the decisions that will define its future.
“Featuring panel discussions and presentations from industry-leading professionals, attendees will hear about emerging trends, where the market is heading and the future of the reinsurance industry.”
The conference will be held in Terrigal, NSW, at the Crowne Plaza.
Find registration details here.
heading: General Insurance
